result.reason: The SSHTunnelConnectionName (SSH Jump Mode) property is likely being copied as an empty string during duplication due to temporary suppression of inheritance in the CopyFrom method of ConnectionInfo.cs, leading to the duplicated connection failing to use the correct jump host.
result.approach: Explicitly copy the SSHTunnelConnectionName property in the ConnectionInfo.CopyFrom method, ensuring its resolved value is transferred to the duplicated connection rather than an un-inherited default.
